midCta.title: Let's find out whether your product is ready for AI integration.

process.heading: Our quick and flexible process uncovers pain points and delivers actionable UX insights in just 1 week.

steps.title: Set goals for the audit
steps.content:
We hold a discovery session to:
• Understand your business domain, goals, and where AI fits into your product vision
• Identify your target users and how they currently interact with the product
• Clarify what a successful AI integration would look like, and what failure would cost

steps.title: Perform the audit
steps.content:
The audit covers two layers:
• Heuristic evaluation of your existing UX: friction points, navigation gaps, consistency issues
• AI readiness assessment: which workflows can absorb AI, where user trust is fragile, and what patterns would feel natural vs. invasive
• Competitor and industry benchmarking on AI feature expectations
• Issues prioritized by severity and risk to user trust

steps.title: Prepare report
steps.content:
You get a detailed report with:
• An in-depth analysis of your product's current UX health
• A specific assessment of where AI can be integrated safely.
• A clear roadmap to transform your product from its current UX to AI-ready, focusing on highest business impact.

keyDeliverables.heading: What you'll get in your design audit.

items.title: Heuristic evaluation
items.description: To begin with, our team of product specialists assesses your product based on industry-standard UX principles, identifying friction points and usability concerns.

items.title: AI readiness review
items.description: We analyze your core workflows, user behavior patterns, and product analytics to identify where AI would enhance the experience, and where it would introduce risk, confusion, or broken trust.

items.title: Visual design analysis
items.description: Next, we dive deep into your user interface to make sure that your product's design is visually cohesive and up-to-date.

items.title: Accessibility review
items.description: In accordance with WCAG 2.2, we ensure that your product complies with international standards and provides an inclusive experience.

items.title: Action plan
items.description: We go the extra mile and provide you with a clear roadmap of improvements to lead to better usability and increased conversions for your product.

pricing.description: We evaluate your product's current UX and identify exactly where integrating AI would improve it, and where it wouldn't.
features: UX heuristic & conversion analysis: Usability issues + friction points impacting conversions.
ADA & accessibility check: Review for WCAG/ADA compliance to ensure inclusive design.
AI readiness checklist: Assessment of your product's AI readiness and next steps.
Actionable recommendations: Prioritized fixes with severity, effort, and impact levels.
Implementation roadmap: Step-by-step plan to apply changes efficiently.

whenToDoIt.heading: The right time to ask if your product is AI-ready is before you commit to building it in.

items.title: Pre-Launch
items.description: Validate your UX foundation before AI-native experiences goes on the roadmap.

items.title: Post-Launch
items.description: Capture early signals on where users trust your product and where they don't, before AI amplifies either.

items.title: Before an AI-ready Redesign
items.description: Know what to keep, what to fix, and what your product structurally needs before AI can be integrated.

items.title: During Underperformance
items.description: Identify whether UX gaps are blocking your AI experience from performing.

items.title: Yearly Health Check
items.description: Keep your product's UX and AI readiness aligned as both your product and user expectations evolve.

whatHappensAfter.heading: You have three ways to move forward

paths.title: Find where AI belongs in your product's UX
paths.description: If you're not sure where AI fits, we move into AI Opportunity Mapping. We identify, score, and prioritize the right opportunities before you spend a dollar on engineering.

paths.title: Design the AI-native experience
paths.description: If you know what to build, we move into AI Feature Design. Interaction patterns, edge cases, error states, production-ready UX, everything your engineers need to build it right.

paths.title: Fix the foundation first
paths.description: Sometimes the audit reveals that AI isn't the priority, UX debt is. We can help you modernize older interfaces that weren't built for intelligent features, so AI has somewhere to live when you're ready.

bottomCta.title: Start with a free 1-day AI readiness check.
bottomCta.subtitle: We'll review your core flows and highlight 3 UX/UI improvements to address before AI integration. See the value, then move to a full audit.

faqs.heading: Still curious about UX audits? We've got the answers you need.

items.question: What is an AI readiness assessment?
items.answer: An AI readiness assessment evaluates whether your product's existing user experience and workflows can support AI integration. It looks at data infrastructure, user journeys, and design patterns to determine where AI would improve the experience and where it might introduce risks.

items.question: How is this different from a regular UX audit?
items.answer: A standard UX audit focuses on usability and conversion barriers based on user behaviour and heuristic evaluation. Our combined audit includes this plus an AI-readiness layer, mapping out where AI can be safely incorporated and highlighting workflows where AI would not add value.

items.question: Why do I need both a UX audit and an AI readiness assessment?
items.answer: AI success depends on a solid UX foundation. If navigation is confusing or data is inconsistent, AI features can amplify frustration instead of helping. Conducting both audits ensures your product is prepared to leverage AI effectively.

items.question: What does the audit process look like?
items.answer: It typically begins with a discovery session to understand your goals, followed by a heuristic UX evaluation and an AI readiness assessment. Competitor and industry benchmarking help prioritise opportunities. You receive a detailed report with findings and a roadmap within one week.

items.question: How long does the audit take?
items.answer: Our streamlined process delivers a full UX audit and AI readiness assessment within one week. This timeframe includes discovery, evaluation, and report preparation.

items.question: What if the assessment shows we're not ready for AI?
items.answer: That outcome is valuable. It tells you where UX debt or workflow issues will hinder AI adoption. We prioritise fixes and can help you modernise your UX before investing in AI features.

items.question: Do you evaluate our technical infrastructure?
items.answer: We focus on user experience and AI readiness from a design and behavioural perspective. While we review data flow and analytics access, a full technical feasibility study involving engineering is a separate engagement.

items.question: How much access do you need to our product?
items.answer: We typically require access to a staging or test environment, analytics data (if available), and a few hours with your team to understand current workflows and goals.

items.question: Can we purchase just the AI readiness assessment?
items.answer: We don't recommend separating them because AI readiness depends on UX quality. However, if you've recently completed a thorough UX audit, we can adapt the assessment accordingly.

items.question: How much does the audit cost?
items.answer: Pricing starts at $6,000 for the combined UX audit & AI readiness assessment. We provide a fixed quote after understanding your product's scope and complexity.
